# Maintenance Manual and Maintenance Cycle Schedule: Establishing Preventive Maintenance Intervals Based on Equipment Criticality

## 适用受众
Facilities_Manager

## 写作角度说明
运维手册与维护周期表是设施经理建立设备预防性维护计划的核心工作。通过分析设备的运行工况和维护要求，制定合理的维护周期和具体任务，减少非计划停机，延长设备寿命。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Setting preventive maintenance intervals based on the manufacturer's default recommendations — without considering the actual operating environment (humidity, temperature, cycle frequency) — leads to either over-maintenance (wasted resources) or under-maintenance (premature failure).

## 参考素材
- Maintenance task categorization: critical tasks (pneumatic seal replacement, interlock verification) → routine tasks (filter pressure drop monitoring, visual inspection) → condition-based tasks (based on monitoring data, not calendar)
- Recommended maintenance intervals: daily → daily operational check (door operation, alarm status, pressure readings) → weekly → clean exterior surfaces, check for visible damage → monthly → seal pressure measurement, interlock function test, filter differential pressure reading → quarterly → seal replacement inspection, BMS communication test → annually → full interlock timing test, pressure sensor recalibration check, pneumatic system inspection
- Seal replacement interval: EPDM seals: every 3-5 years or 10,000 cycles (whichever is first) → silicone seals: every 5-8 years or 20,000 cycles → verify with actual operating conditions
- Maintenance task documentation: each task → step-by-step procedure reference (from O&M manual) → estimated time → required spare parts → required tools → special skills required
- CMMS integration: enter all preventive maintenance tasks into Computerized Maintenance Management System → schedule automated work order generation → track completion rates and overdue tasks

## 关键词
Preventive Maintenance, Maintenance Schedule, PM Program, Seal Replacement, Maintenance Cycle, CMMS
